_meta.note: w_types count DISTINCT (src_decl,dep_decl) pairs per bucket (sig bucket = sig+field+extends kernel edge types; def; proof); docref rows excluded entirely; self-loops at this grain excluded; top_witnesses = up to 3 [src_decl, dep_decl] FQ decl-name pairs by raw row frequency over the included buckets. Default render layer = sig.
